description: CompositionKhakhi cargo pants made of 100% cotton in a washed look, has a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two cargo pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, two buttoned cargo pockets on the thighs, looped waist, printed brand name on the waistband, panel and flap detailing on the right thigh, and a button and zipper closureFittingMid-low rise; Straight legWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned to be worn as casual wear with t-shirts, jackets and accessories, these cargo pants from basics are made of cotton fabric to offer a flawless casual silhouette.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 40 cmHeight: 6.2', Waist: 32"
